active_goal: Complete QuickPLS as a free, proprietary, fully offline Windows desktop application that is first ready in all sense before unrestricted research use.

policy.stable_export_rule: Stable exports must reject or watermark experimental results.
policy.validation_rule: A method cannot be marked validated until formula, implementation, reference fixtures, simulations or metamorphic tests, UI, CLI, exports, and documentation gates all pass.

gates.evidence: validation/results/studentized_supplied_reference.json proves supplied-value bootstrap-t formula agreement between independent Python and R Type-7 references within 1e-12; validation/results/pls_bootstrap_external_reference.json, validation/results/pls_bootstrap_corporate_csem_reference.json, and validation/results/pls_bootstrap_plspm_external_reference.json prove PLS-integrated external-reference agreement; validation/results/studentized_minimum_quickpls.json proves bounded minimum 999x99 execution; validation/results/studentized_worker_matrix.json proves deterministic worker-invariant execution; validation/plan_studentized_qualification_shards.py and validation/run_studentized_qualification_shards.py provide the 40-shard preregistered execution path; validation/results/studentized_qualification_shards/status.json reports 40 complete full-manifest shards; validation/results/monte_carlo_studentized_qualification.json evaluates the complete preregistered set with passed=true after all four normal/heavy-tail scenarios reached 1,000/1,000 simulations, zero failures, and full studentized availability; final studentized coverage is 0.964, studentized type-I/exclusion is 0.03, heavy-tail studentized coverage is 0.941, and heavy-tail studentized type-I/exclusion is 0.054; validation/results/v04_inference_qualification_quick.json now reports qualification_passed=true

gates.name: Release-stress studentized performance

slices.name: Extended PLS models
slices.summary: The pls_mediation_v1 effect classifier, bootstrap indirect-effect surfacing, independent and R base-lm mediation references, published/example mediation evidence, bounded mediation simulation/metamorphic checks, bounded indirect-effect randomization evidence, experimental two-stage moderation product-score estimation with independent, R base-lm, published-formula, published empirical-data, bounded simulation, metamorphic, inference integration, bounded inference-qualification, and release-oriented coverage-qualification evidence, typed control-variable path semantics, experimental PLSc reflective-only correction estimation, experimental WPLS positive case-weighted estimation, experimental CCA composite residual diagnostics, experimental Gaussian-copula endogeneity diagnostics, experimental fixed-score quadratic nonlinear diagnostics, experimental moderated mediation conditional indirect effects, experimental CTA-PLS sample-covariance tetrad diagnostics, extended-PLS unsupported guards, method-specific saved-run result panels, method-specific GUI run controls, export-safe CSV/HTML/XLSX method tables, saved-run comparison views, publication SVG diagrams, browser print/PDF reports, v0.5 evidence traceability, and the higher-order construct recipe/editor schema plus repeated-indicator, two-stage, and hybrid estimator/reference slices complete the current experimental v0.5 preview scope. Methods remain experimental until future validation promotion criteria are met.
